summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bureaucracy Intelligence Engine (BureauSmart) - German SaaS app for document analysis. All core features working correctly including auth flow, dashboard, and document upload interface.
passed_tests: Protected routes correctly redirect to login when not authenticated
Landing page loads with German text content
Login page form renders and accepts admin credentials
Dashboard page loads after successful login
Document upload dropzone is visible and functional
Logout functionality works and redirects correctly
Auth context and protected routes working properly
